div.data-gtm-region: No Value

bsp-jw-player.data-video-title: President Trump says he is reviewing a new Iranian proposal to end the war

div.p: President Donald Trump said on Saturday that he was reviewing a new Iranian proposal to end the war. “I’ll let you know about it later,” he said before boarding Air Force One, adding that “they’re going to give me the exact wording now.”

a.span: President Trump says he is reviewing a new Iranian proposal to end the war

Trump rejected a previous Iranian proposal this week. However, conversations have continued, and the three-week ceasefire appears to be holding. Trump has also floated a new plan to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

div.data-gtm-region: Trump says US will reduce number of troops in Germany ‘a lot further’ than withdrawal of 5,000

a.span: Trump says US will reduce number of troops in Germany ‘a lot further’ than withdrawal of 5,000

bsp-jw-player.data-video-title: Spirit Airlines goes out of business after 34 years, ending operations immediately

div.p: Spirit Airlines, an impish upstart that shook the industry with its irreverent ads and deep discount fares, announced Saturday that it has gone out of business after 34 years.

a.span: What to do if you were traveling on Spirit Airlines, which is now shutting down
The collapse of the U.S.-based Spirit Airlines may mark the end of an era for travelers with a certain financial sensibility.

div.data-gtm-region: WATCH: Laid off flight attendant reacts to news of airline closure

Spring is when wildlife from birds to deer to alligators nest or bear young, often close to humans. Wildlife experts say homeowners and passersby should leave nests and young animals alone.

Far from the original in Philadelphia, these fans hunt for the Liberty Bell replica in each state

a.aria-label: Far from the original in Philadelphia, these fans hunt for the Liberty Bell replica in each state

img.alt: Romer Derr rings a replica of the Liberty Bell outside the Federal Building 49 times, signifying Alaska's joining the United States as the 49th state, on July 1, 1958, in Juneau, Alaska. Behind Derr holding the Alaska flag, left, is Judy Findlay and holding the U.S. flag, right, is Marilee Nowacki. (AP Photo/JK, File)

a.span: Far from the original in Philadelphia, these fans hunt for the Liberty Bell replica in each state

If you can’t visit the original Liberty Bell in Philadelphia, you might find a dead ringer nearby. For a 1950 bond drive, the Treasury Department commissioned replicas for each U.S. state and several territories.

span.span: The Associated Press is an independent global news organization dedicated to factual reporting. Founded in 1846, AP today remains the most trusted source of fast, accurate, unbiased news in all formats and the essential provider of the technology and services vital to the news business. More than half the world’s population sees AP journalism every day.
